name: Dr. Devendra Chaplot
title: AI Research Scientist
bio: Dr. Devendra Chaplot is a Research Scientist at Mistral AI working on building the next generation of AI models. Earlier he was a Research Scientist at Facebook AI Research where he worked at the intersection of Computer Vision and Robotics. Mistral AI can grasp the nuances of language, context, and even emotions. For now, Mistral AI is valued at $2 Billion in Funding Round, reported by The New York Times.

name: Sri Satish Ambati
title: Co-Founder & CEO
bio: Sri Ambati is the Co-Founder and CEO of H2O.ai since 2011. H2O.ai democratizes AI by building user-friendly tools and fostering collaboratioin to make AI accessible to everyone. H2O.ai has raised a total of $251.1M in funding over 9 rounds. Their latest funding was raised on May 12, 2023 from a secondary market round. H2O.ai focuses on Ease of Use and Accessibility, Automated Machine Learning (AutoML), Scalability and Performance. Currently H2O with a valuation of $1.6 billion.

name: Rodrigo Liang
title: Co-Founder & CEO
bio: Rodrigo Liang, Co-Founder of SambaNova Systems, has propelled the company to a prominent position in AI tech. Founded in 2017 in Palo Alto, SambaNova has swiftly expanded, securing $1.13 billion in funding across multiple rounds. Their innovative hardware and software advance AI applications, pushing the limits of machine learning capabilities, empowering businesses to fully leverage artificial intelligence.

name: Cedric Vidal
title: Principal AI Advocate for Startups
bio: Cedric Vidal is the Principal AI Advocate for Startups at Microsoft, where he helps startups leverage AI technologies. He is an innovative technology builder with experience as a senior software engineer, team leader, and former CTO at companies like Argo AI and Quicksign. As an AI advocate at Microsoft, he plays a crucial role in enabling startups to harness the power of AI for their businesses.

name: Yashar Behzadi
title: Founder & CEO
bio: Synthesis AI, founded by experienced entrepreneur Yashar Behzadi, specializes in advancing more capable and ethical AI through synthetic data technologies. The company is dedicated to transforming the computer vision paradigm by enabling customers to develop better models more quickly and cost-effectively compared to traditional human-annotated methods. As of the latest update, Synthesis AI has raised $17 million in funding.

name: Dr. Yangqing Jia
title: Founder
bio: Dr. Yangqing Jia, as the Founder & CEO of Lepton.ai, spearheads a company that is a leader in AI technology development. His expertise is centered on generative artificial intelligence (GenAI), a key area in AI that involves the creation of new, innovative solutions and data interpretations. Lepton AI is an open-source, cloud-native AI development platform founded by Dr. Yangqing Jia, designed to make AI application development accessible for every developer, particularly those proficient in Python.

name: Dr. Ameer Haj-Ali
title: Founding Engineer
bio: Dr. Ameer is working on a new AI startup. Before that he was a founding engineer at Anyscale where he helped grow the company from 0 to 150 and headed Platform, Infrastructure, and Gen AI organizations and the major releases, such as Multi-Cloud Infrastructure, General Availability, LLM Endpoints. He completed his CS PhD in 2 years (the fastest in the university) at UC Berkeley in AI and System working with Professors Ion Stoica and Krste Asanovic. He received the valedictorian honor from the Technion twice for his M.Sc. and B.Sc.

name: Dr. Michael Stewart
title: Managing Partner
bio: Michael Stewart is the Managing Partner at M12, where he spearheads investment theses in generative AI, gaming, web3, and other deep technology domains. Holding both a PhD and an MBA, Michael brings over two decades of expertise in semiconductor and hard technology products, as well as in investment. His career is distinguished by his roles in founding two startups and securing over 40 patents, marking him as a leading figure in the field of technology innovation and venture capital.

name: Tuhin Srivastava
title: Co-Founder
bio: Tuhin Srivastava is the Co-Founder and CEO of Baseten, a company dedicated to simplifying the deployment of machine learning models into production without the need for extensive backend, frontend, or MLOps knowledge. Baseten has raised a total of $60 million in funding and is aligned with companies like DataRobot, Algorithmia, and Tecton in its mission to make machine learning more accessible. The platform aids teams in quickly deploying models and developing both front and backend solutions, thereby enhancing decision-making speed and quality.

name: Dr. Josh Tobin
title: Co-Founder
bio: Gantry, co-founded by former OpenAI researcher Dr. Josh Tobin. Gantry AI focuses on offering observability, analytics, and evaluation tools to enhance AI-powered products. Their platform enables companies to capture comprehensive data from their AI models, including user interactions and feedback. The company has secured a total funding of $28.3 million, including a $23.9 million Series A round and a previously undisclosed $4.4 million seed round.

name: Dr. Jasper Zhang
title: Co-Founder & CEO
bio: Dr. Jasper Zhang is the Co-Founder and CEO of Hyperbolic Labs. He completed his Ph.D. in Mathematics at UC Berkeley in just two years and has won multiple gold medals in global mathematics competitions. Hyperbolic Labs is dedicated to ensuring open access to AI for developers and researchers worldwide. They are building a scalable system to aggregate global GPU compute and developing AI services to maximize GPU performance. Additionally, they are implementing novel solutions to guarantee the accuracy and privacy of AI systems.

name: Dr. Jim Fan
title: Research Manager & Lead of Embodied AI
bio: Dr. Jim Fan is a Senior Research Scientist at NVIDIA and leads the AI Agents Initiative, focusing on developing versatile agents for both real and simulated environments. His expertise spans multimodal foundation models, reinforcement learning, and computer vision. With a Ph.D. from Stanford Vision Lab under Prof. Fei-Fei Li, Jim has interned at OpenAI, Baidu AI Labs, and MILA, contributing to AI research alongside leaders like Ilya Sutskever and Yoshua Bengio. As a Columbia University Valedictorian, he was awarded the Illig Medal in 2016.

name: Minfa Wang
title: CTO
bio: Minfa Wang is the CTO of 1Gen Labs. He was a Senior Machine Learning Engineer at Waymo, where he leverages advanced ML techniques to enhance autonomous driving technologies. With a deep focus on innovation and safety, Minfa plays a crucial role in developing 1Gen Agent systems that improves the community engagement.

name: Dr. Rashmi Misra
title: Chief AI Officer
bio: Dr. Rashmi Misra is the Chief AI Officer at Analog Devices, where she leads the company's AI initiatives. Rashmi has spent her career on the cutting edge of AI products, engineering challenges and go-to-market opportunities, and has garnered broad industry influence and recognition. With a PhD in AI, she brings extensive experience in international business development and innovation across various sectors. Dr. Misra holds six international patents and is actively involved in recruiting top talent in cutting-edge technology fields.

name: Dr. Denis Yarats
title: Co-Founder & CTO
bio: Dr. Denis Yarats, the Co-Founder and CTO of Perplexity AI. Perplexity AI is an AI-powered search engine and chatbot that utilizes advanced technologies such as natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning to provide accurate and comprehensive answers to user queries, which brings the challenges to Google Search. Perplexity AI,secured $100 million in funding, which elevated the company's valuation to a total of $520 million.

name: Jason Wei
title: AI Researcher
bio: Jason Wei currently works at OpenAI as a member of the technical staff. Jason graduated from Dartmouth College. He was a senior research scientist at Google Brain. He popularized some key ideas in large language models: chain-of-thought prompting, instruction tuning, and emergent phenomena.

name: Jonathan Ross
title: Founder & CEO
bio: Jonathan Ross, CEO and founder of Groq Inc., Groq's core product is a unique processor designed for efficient computation in machine learning and artificial intelligence applications. Often described as Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) or specific accelerators, Groq's processors emphasize simplified interaction between hardware and software, along with enhanced data processing speed and efficiency. Groq is now raising a new funding round, current valued at around $3B. Before Groq, Ross contributed to Google’s Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) and was part of Google X's Rapid Eval Team, initiating projects for Alphabet.
